---
title: "Midterm Paper"
author: "Michael San Pietro"
date: "2025-10-15"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

## R Markdown

```{r}
library('stargazer')
```


```{r}
library('tidyverse')
library('stargazer')
library('readxl')
```


```{r}
EDUCdata <- read_xlsx("C:/Users/masan/OneDrive/Desktop/Midterm EconGEO/EducationRates.xlsx")
colnames(EDUCdata)[colnames(EDUCdata) == '2024'] <- 'EducRate(2024)'
colnames(EDUCdata)[colnames(EDUCdata) == 'GrowthRate'] <- 'GrowthRate(2013-2024)'
regress1 <- lm(EDUCdata$'EducRate(2024)' ~ HistoricalCoal, data=EDUCdata)
regress2 <-lm(EDUCdata$'GrowthRate(2013-2024)' ~ HistoricalCoal, data=EDUCdata)
stargazer(regress1, regress2, type=".png", out="regression_table.png")
```
